## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. (e.g., "I'm frustrated when...")

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution or feature you'd like to see implemented.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context or mockups about the feature request here.
